title: Tick Control Midwood Brooklyn | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control in Midwood, Brooklyn starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Midwood's tree-lined streets and beautiful residential yards create the perfect environment for ticks to thrive, putting your family and pets at risk of Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Midwood, from the homes near Avenue M to properties surrounding Marine Park. Our proven tick elimination treatments protect your outdoor spaces so you can enjoy your backyard safely all season long.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Midwood families for years with eco-friendly tick control solutions that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's urban-suburban blend and provide customized treatments with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Midwood's characteristic single-family homes with yards, proximity to green spaces like Marine Park and the Brooklyn College campus, and the neighborhood's many tree-canopied streets create ideal tick habitats. Whether you live near Kings Highway or closer to the Flatbush border, our local experts know exactly where ticks hide in Midwood properties and how to eliminate them effectively.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Midwood range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the severity of the infestation. We offer free estimates and can provide same-day service for most Midwood locations.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Midwood, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Midwood from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, mild winters mean ticks can be present year-round in Brooklyn, so vigilance is important even in cooler months.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-3 hours after treatment, then your yard is safe to enjoy.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick control treatment in Midwood?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend monthly or bi-monthly tick treatments during peak season (April-October). Many Midwood homeowners choose our seasonal packages for comprehensive coverage and the best value, especially if their yards border wooded areas or they have pets that spend time outdoors.
